name: Ginger Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt; add ginger, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, milk, and molasses.
3. Gradually mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Stir in melted shortening and grated cheese until evenly distributed.
5. Fill muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes.
